steps.title: Use the genre clue
steps.content: True History contains tropes now associated with science fiction and is regarded by some scholars as the earliest known work in that genre. The blank should describe a work that imaginatively anticipates a much later genre.

steps.title: Choose ahead-of-time meaning
steps.content: A means officially approved, B means relevant, and C focuses on mockery rather than the science-fiction evidence in the sentence. The context calls for a word meaning forward-looking or ahead of its time. The answer is D.
